mapper.select: SELECT count(p.sfid) AS rows FROM paymentsystemlinkinfor p WHERE (date_trunc('second', p.lastmodifieddate) >= ${startTime})

SELECT p.sfid, p.internetpaymerstore, p.linepaychannelid, p.linepaychannelsecret, p.aupaystoreid, p.serviceid, p.tofacemerchantid, p.nontofacemerchantid, p.tofacehashkey, p.nontofacehashkey, p.tofaceencryptkey, p.nontofaceencryptkey, p.tofaceencryptiv, p.nontofaceencryptiv, p.tofacebasicauthid, p.nontofacebasicauthid, p.tofacebasicauthpassword, p.nontofacebasicauthpassword, p.tofacecardtype, p.nontofacecardtype, p.tofacepaymentrouteid, p.nontofacepaymentrouteid, p.appcompany, p.lastmodifieddate FROM paymentsystemlinkinfor p WHERE(date_trunc('second',p.lastmodifieddate) >=${startTime}) ORDER BY p.sfid DESC OFFSET ${offset} LIMIT ${limit}

SELECT p.sfid, p.internetpaymerstore, p.linepaychannelsecret, p.aupaystoreid, p.serviceid, p.linepaychannelid, p.tofacemerchantid, p.tofacehashkey, p.tofaceencryptkey, p.tofaceencryptiv, p.tofacebasicauthid, p.tofacebasicauthpassword, p.tofacecardtype, p.tofacepaymentrouteid, p.nontofacemerchantid, p.nontofacehashkey, p.nontofaceencryptkey, p.nontofaceencryptiv, p.nontofacebasicauthid, p.nontofacebasicauthpassword, p.nontofacecardtype, p.nontofacepaymentrouteid, p.appcompany FROM paymentsystemlinkinforsync p WHERE p.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY p.sfid DESC

SELECT sfid FROM (WITH TO_CHECK (sfid) AS (VALUES ${ids}) SELECT tc.sfid, NOT EXISTS (SELECT sfid FROM paymentsystemlinkinforsync p WHERE p.sfid = tc.sfid) AS checked FROM to_check tc) AS t WHERE t.checked = #{checked}

SELECT p.sfid, p.internetpaymerstore, p.linepaychannelid, p.linepaychannelsecret, p.aupaystoreid, p.serviceid, p.tofacemerchantid, p.nontofacemerchantid, p.tofacehashkey, p.nontofacehashkey, p.tofaceencryptkey, p.nontofaceencryptkey, p.tofaceencryptiv, p.nontofaceencryptiv, p.tofacebasicauthid, p.nontofacebasicauthid, p.tofacebasicauthpassword, p.nontofacebasicauthpassword, p.tofacecardtype, p.nontofacecardtype, p.tofacepaymentrouteid, p.nontofacepaymentrouteid, p.appcompany, p.lastmodifieddate FROM paymentsystemlinkinfor p WHERE p.sfid=#{id}
SELECT p.sfid FROM paymentsystemlinkinfor p WHERE p.sfid IN (${ids}) ORDER BY p.sfid DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO paymentsystemlinkinfor (sfid, internetpaymerstore, linepaychannelid, linepaychannelsecret, aupaystoreid, serviceid, tofacemerchantid, nontofacemerchantid, tofacehashkey, nontofacehashkey, tofaceencryptkey, nontofaceencryptkey, tofaceencryptiv, nontofaceencryptiv, tofacebasicauthid, nontofacebasicauthid, tofacebasicauthpassword, nontofacebasicauthpassword, tofacecardtype, nontofacecardtype, tofacepaymentrouteid, nontofacepaymentrouteid, appcompany, lastmodifieddate) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{internetpaymerstore}, #{linepaychannelid}, #{linepaychannelsecret}, #{aupaystoreid}, #{serviceid}, #{tofacemerchantid}, #{nontofacemerchantid}, #{tofacehashkey}, #{nontofacehashkey}, #{tofaceencryptkey}, #{nontofaceencryptkey}, #{tofaceencryptiv}, #{nontofaceencryptiv}, #{tofacebasicauthid}, #{nontofacebasicauthid}, #{tofacebasicauthpassword}, #{nontofacebasicauthpassword}, #{tofacecardtype}, #{nontofacecardtype}, #{tofacepaymentrouteid}, #{nontofacepaymentrouteid}, #{appcompany}, #{lastmodifieddate})
mapper.update: UPDATE paymentsystemlinkinfor SET internetpaymerstore=#{internetpaymerstore}, linepaychannelid=#{linepaychannelid}, linepaychannelsecret=#{linepaychannelsecret}, aupaystoreid=#{aupaystoreid}, serviceid=#{serviceid}, tofacemerchantid=#{tofacemerchantid}, nontofacemerchantid=#{nontofacemerchantid}, tofacehashkey=#{tofacehashkey}, nontofacehashkey=#{nontofacehashkey}, tofaceencryptkey=#{tofaceencryptkey}, nontofaceencryptkey=#{nontofaceencryptkey}, tofaceencryptiv=#{tofaceencryptiv}, nontofaceencryptiv=#{nontofaceencryptiv}, tofacebasicauthid=#{tofacebasicauthid}, nontofacebasicauthid=#{nontofacebasicauthid}, tofacebasicauthpassword=#{tofacebasicauthpassword}, nontofacebasicauthpassword=#{nontofacebasicauthpassword}, tofacecardtype=#{tofacecardtype}, nontofacecardtype=#{nontofacecardtype}, tofacepaymentrouteid=#{tofacepaymentrouteid}, nontofacepaymentrouteid=#{nontofacepaymentrouteid}, appcompany=#{appcompany}, lastmodifieddate=#{lastmodifieddate} WHERE sfid = #{sfid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO paymentsystemlinkinforsync (sfid, internetpaymerstore, linepaychannelid, linepaychannelsecret, aupaystoreid, serviceid, tofacemerchantid, nontofacemerchantid, tofacehashkey, nontofacehashkey, tofaceencryptkey, nontofaceencryptkey, tofaceencryptiv, nontofaceencryptiv, tofacebasicauthid, nontofacebasicauthid, tofacebasicauthpassword, nontofacebasicauthpassword, tofacecardtype, nontofacecardtype, tofacepaymentrouteid, nontofacepaymentrouteid, appcompany, syncedtime) VALUES(#{sfid}, #{internetpaymerstore}, #{linepaychannelid}, #{linepaychannelsecret}, #{aupaystoreid}, #{serviceid}, #{tofacemerchantid}, #{nontofacemerchantid}, #{tofacehashkey}, #{nontofacehashkey}, #{tofaceencryptkey}, #{nontofaceencryptkey}, #{tofaceencryptiv}, #{nontofaceencryptiv}, #{tofacebasicauthid}, #{nontofacebasicauthid}, #{tofacebasicauthpassword}, #{nontofacebasicauthpassword}, #{tofacecardtype}, #{nontofacecardtype}, #{tofacepaymentrouteid}, #{nontofacepaymentrouteid}, #{appcompany}, #{syncedtime})
mapper.update: UPDATE paymentsystemlinkinforsync SET internetpaymerstore=#{internetpaymerstore}, linepaychannelid=#{linepaychannelid}, linepaychannelsecret=#{linepaychannelsecret}, aupaystoreid=#{aupaystoreid}, serviceid=#{serviceid}, tofacemerchantid=#{tofacemerchantid}, nontofacemerchantid=#{nontofacemerchantid}, tofacehashkey=#{tofacehashkey}, nontofacehashkey=#{nontofacehashkey}, tofaceencryptkey=#{tofaceencryptkey}, nontofaceencryptkey=#{nontofaceencryptkey}, tofaceencryptiv=#{tofaceencryptiv}, nontofaceencryptiv=#{nontofaceencryptiv}, tofacebasicauthid=#{tofacebasicauthid}, nontofacebasicauthid=#{nontofacebasicauthid}, tofacebasicauthpassword=#{tofacebasicauthpassword}, nontofacebasicauthpassword=#{nontofacebasicauthpassword}, tofacecardtype=#{tofacecardtype}, nontofacecardtype=#{nontofacecardtype}, tofacepaymentrouteid=#{tofacepaymentrouteid}, nontofacepaymentrouteid=#{nontofacepaymentrouteid}, appcompany=#{appcompany}, syncedtime=#{syncedtime} WHERE sfid = #{sfid}
